title: Sapphire Foods India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Sapphire Foods India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India:
Sapphire Foods India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India!
